---
layout: default
title: "Parliament Deadlock Continues Amid Legislative Push"
date: 2026-07-24T03:52:10.922481+00:00
summary: "Parliament faces a fourth day of disruption over paper leaks, while the government prepares new anti-leak legislation and debates judicial reforms"
run_time_ist: "9:22AM"
---

<article class="digest-post">
  <a class="back-link" href="{{ '/' | relative_url }}">Political Brief</a>
  <p class="post-meta">Gemini Summary: 9:22AM</p>


<h2 class="section-title">India National Politics</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Parliamentary deadlock:</strong> The Monsoon Session has seen a fourth consecutive day of washouts as the opposition and ruling party remain locked in a standoff over the NEET paper leak issue.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I3</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I4</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I5</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Legislative agenda:</strong> The Lok Sabha is set to deliberate on the Supreme Court Judges Amendment Bill, even as a separate constitutional amendment regarding women&#x27;s reservation recently failed to pass.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I1</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I2</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiqwFBVV95cUxPSTVKRHVGUXlhNjVqNEczYkNpd1NvbmRYOU5Fd2RIZjV3OHBob0owSzh3LVRXdUVqSDNVZTgtbVZlUG8ybS1wallfSVdTeTRtNENIU0lwV3piczdxV2NEVmE0WC1GSTQyMjR4dkNPb1pqblB2SzNHQjZBRWVXZHpPZXE2bVlQc3NGNEFJVU1NUHJMMFFqSkdRUVFFMGZNRUkzSTc0LXphM1JaLXM?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I13</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Political blame game:</strong> BJP leaders have accused the Congress-led opposition of prioritizing protests over parliamentary proceedings to remain politically relevant following recent election defeats.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I8</a></span></li>
</ul>

<h2 class="section-title">Policy and Institutions</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Anti-paper leak measures:</strong> The Union Cabinet is set to approve a stringent new anti-paper leak bill, featuring provisions for fast-track courts and tougher punishments to address student concerns.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W1</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMixwFBVV95cUxQQl93MEtFSC1oLVk5SWttRjV6OF9LRm4xNm1QQmJWdHVCc3dURnI5V1BhSll6ajRIeWxnMTEwQm90UTBwZVg1bjJTOHc5NENQOGd3OEF1ZjFxOTFkZ0ppOHFiZTlQbWFkalR4Vm56b1FsVUxiTVJNaUxHcWpRUmd2M1o2M0lPX0txX2dITVBHN09DYU14NVczVmRrWEJlU1drenRIRHdyWjlMZGI1RVk1bV9ZSGZnNVJJZWY0MFctbWNVbFlLLXNz?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W2</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W3</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W4</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Governance and oversight:</strong> Prime Minister Modi highlighted the 11-year milestone of the Digital India initiative, while the Election Commission concluded a national conference focused on strengthening electoral institutions.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W4</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W3</a></span></li>
</ul>
